hero_headline: Does your Matter device actually work in your ecosystem?
hero_sub: Crowdsourced real-world compatibility data. See what works, what breaks, and why — across every device, ecosystem, and connection type.
pains: Vendors claim Matter support, but you lose color temperature and grouping — buyer's remorse on day one
Same device, completely different behavior across Apple Home, SmartThings, and Home Assistant — which do you choose?
Firmware updates every month, compatibility shifts, and all online guides go stale — zero maintenance, zero accountability

proof: Early testers are building this database right now. Your feedback decides which devices we prioritize next.
cta_sub: Free for beta testers. Help us complete the data, get lifetime access.

faq.q: How is this different from official compatibility lists?
faq.a: Official lists say 'Matter compatible.' We show what actually breaks, which ecosystems fail, and why — real usability.

faq.q: How often is the data updated?
faq.a: Real-time crowdsourced updates. We aggregate firmware and OS changes weekly — no stale official docs.

faq.q: Which devices are covered right now?
faq.a: Beta covers Philips Hue, Eve, Nanoleaf, and major hubs. More added weekly based on user demand.
